name: insertRequestLog
code:
INSERT INTO REQUEST_LOG (SYNC_SESSION, TIPO, REQUEST_URL, REQUEST_METHOD, RESPONSE_CODE, RESPONSE_BODY, TICKETS_COUNT, ERRO, DURACAO_MS, DATA)
    VALUES ('{{session}}', '{{tipo}}', '{{requestUrl}}', '{{method}}', {{responseCode}}, '{{responseBody}}', {{ticketsCount}}, '{{erro}}', {{duracaoMs}}, '{{data}}')
